name: Lush Notebook
description: A handy Lush-branded notebook, perfect for jotting down your favourite product combinations, bath rituals, or Kitchen wishlist. A fun non-cosmetic extra included in the XL subscription box.
archive_note: A non-cosmetic branded item included as a bonus in the October 2025 Lush Kitchen XL subscription box.
nostalgia_angle: A charming non-cosmetic extra that delights subscribers, reminiscent of Lush's tradition of including fun branded extras in special boxes.
throwback_reference: Continues Lush's tradition of including lifestyle and stationery extras in special subscription and gift sets.
